glosses.ja: 取り除く; 排除する

translations.vi: Tôi xóa các tệp không cần thiết.
translations.id: Saya menghapus file yang tidak perlu.
translations.ja: 不要なファイルを削除します。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative (1st person singular here); transitive, selecting a direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces a definite direct object.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of the verb.
Attributive adjective, plural; post-nominal modifier agreeing with 'fichiers'.

sentences.target: Elle élimine la poussière du clavier.

translations.fr: Elle élimine la poussière du clavier.
translations.en: She removes dust from the keyboard.
translations.de: Sie entfernt den Staub von der Tastatur.
translations.it: Lei rimuove la polvere dalla tastiera.
translations.pt: Ela tira o pó do teclado.
translations.vi: Cô ấy lau bụi trên bàn phím.
translations.ar: هي تزيل الغبار من لوحة المفاتيح.
translations.nl: Ze verwijdert het stof van het toetsenbord.
translations.hi: वह कीबोर्ड की धूल हटाती है.
translations.el: Αφαιρεί τη σκόνη από το πληκτρολόγιο.
translations.sv: Hon tar bort dammet från tangentbordet.
translations.ro: Ea îndepărtează praful de pe tastatură.
translations.ja: 彼女はキーボードのほこりを取り除きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); transitive, governs a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Contracted preposition ('de' + 'le'); introduces a nominal complement ('clavier') of 'poussière'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du', complementing 'poussière'.

sentences.target: On doit éliminer ces vieux cartons.

translations.fr: On doit éliminer ces vieux cartons.
translations.en: We have to get rid of these old boxes.
translations.es: Tenemos que deshacernos de estas cajas viejas.
translations.de: Wir müssen diese alten Kartons entsorgen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo sbarazzarci di queste vecchie scatole.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得处理掉这些旧纸箱。
translations.yue: 我哋要處理呢啲舊紙箱。
translations.ru: Нам нужно избавиться от этих старых коробок.
translations.pt: Temos que nos livrar dessas caixas velhas.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להיפטר מהקופסאות הישנות האלה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải bỏ những thùng cũ này đi.
translations.ar: علينا التخلص من هذه الصناديق القديمة.
translations.nl: We moeten deze oude dozen wegdoen.
translations.uk: Нам треба позбутися цих старих коробок.
translations.hu: Meg kell szabadulnunk ezektől a régi dobozoktól.
translations.hi: हमें इन पुराने बक्सों से छुटकारा पाना है.
translations.pl: Musimy pozbyć się tych starych pudeł.
translations.el: Πρέπει να ξεφορτωθούμε αυτά τα παλιά κουτιά.
translations.nb: Vi må bli kvitt disse gamle eskene.
translations.id: Kita harus menyingkirkan kotak-kotak lama ini.
translations.sv: Vi måste bli av med de här gamla lådorna.
translations.ro: Trebuie să scăpăm de aceste cutii vechi.
translations.cs: Musíme se zbavit těchto starých krabic.
translations.da: Vi skal af med disse gamle kasser.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää päästä eroon näistä vanhoista laatikoista.
translations.ja: これらの古い箱を処分しなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/generic subject pronoun (3rd person singular form, often colloquial 'we').
Modal verb in present indicative (3rd person singular); selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive lexical verb; head of the infinitival clause functioning as complement of 'doit'.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; deictically specifies the noun.
Pre-nominal adjective, plural; modifies 'cartons'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'éliminer'.

sentences.target: Ils éliminent les odeurs de la poubelle.

translations.fr: Ils éliminent les odeurs de la poubelle.
translations.en: They remove the trash can smells.
translations.es: Eliminan los malos olores del cubo de basura.
translations.de: Sie beseitigen die Gerüche aus dem Mülleimer.
translations.it: Eliminano i cattivi odori dal bidone della spazzatura.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们去除垃圾桶的异味。
translations.yue: 佢哋去除垃圾桶嘅異味。
translations.ru: Они устраняют запахи из мусорного ведра.
translations.pt: Eles eliminam os maus odores da lixeira.
translations.nl: Ze verwijderen de geuren uit de prullenbak.
translations.uk: Вони усувають запахи зі сміттєвого відра.
translations.hi: वे कूड़ेदान की बदबू को दूर करते हैं.
translations.pl: Usuwają zapachy z kosza na śmieci.
translations.el: Αφαιρούν τις οσμές από τον κάδο σκουπιδιών.
translations.id: Mereka menghilangkan bau dari tempat sampah.
translations.sv: De tar bort lukterna från soptunnan.
translations.ro: Ei elimină mirosurile din coșul de gunoi.
translations.ja: 彼らはゴミ箱の臭いを取り除きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural masculine; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative (3rd person plural); transitive, governs a direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the direct object.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying source/origin.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the object of the preposition.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de', complementing 'odeurs'.
